From libguides citation page found reference to official NUS policy PDF at cttlt.nus.edu.sg

summary: NUS has well-established AI policy infrastructure. Found 4 verified sources: NUS official AI policy PDF (ctlt.nus.edu.sg), two library guides on AI citation and guidelines, and the NUS AI Institute governance page. The official policy PDF is the primary university-wide AI policy document. Library guides provide supplementary guidance. The AI Institute page focuses on research governance roundtables. One candidate (teaching academy page) rejected as JS-rendered with no extractable content.
